proposal.summary: Add a batchmode-friendly BuildScript.BuildWindows entry point for Windows player builds without generating the final build in this unit.
out_of_scope: Generating the final Windows player build
Creating new UI or gameplay prefabs

user_decisions.decision: Proceed through Harness steps automatically and treat the recurring next-step prompt as approval to continue approved-for-implementation units.

decision_log.reason: phases/index.json has no active or blocked phase and NEXT_ACTION.md recommends WindowsBuildScript.

current_state: Completed. BuildScript.BuildWindows exists, validates with Unity MCP, targets Windows x64, uses enabled Build Settings scenes, and writes to a generated Build/Windows output path.
resume_instructions: This phase is complete. Next, start one new Harness unit for WindowsPlayerBuild only if phases/index.json has no in_progress or blocked phase.
next_action: Start WindowsPlayerBuild to run BuildScript.BuildWindows and verify the generated Windows player output.
